scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @wambot/api" "npm run dev -w @wambot/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wambot/api && npm run build -w @wambot/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w @wambot/api" "npm run start -w @wambot/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @wambot/api && npm run typecheck -w @wambot/web
